description: Concrete editorial / review request. The lifeform should treat this as problem_solving with optional guided_exploration when the user asks for trade-off framing, NOT route to emotional support.

turns.user_input: I have a one-paragraph bio I want shorter and punchier. Can you take a pass?
Here it is: 'I am a designer who loves slow craft and works on documentation tools.'
Two versions please — one playful, one neutral.
